title: SNDL Reports First Quarter 2024 Financial and Operational Results
text: SNDL announced its first-quarter financial results, demonstrating improved operational performance across multiple metrics. The company achieved net revenue of $197.8 million, up 4% year-over-year, with a record gross margin of 25% compared to 17% in the prior year. This represented a 55% improvement in gross profit driven by the data sales program and supply chain efficiencies. Operating cash flow showed dramatic improvement, with negative cash flow of $6.1 million in Q1 2024 versus negative $66.3 million in Q1 2023—a 91% improvement. Free cash flow similarly improved 89% year-over-year to negative $6.4 million. The Liquor Retail segment maintained stable revenue at $116.1 million while expanding margins to 25%. Cannabis Retail generated $71.3 million in revenue with a 2.1% same-store sales increase. Cannabis Operations achieved record gross profit of $3.2 million, reversing prior-year losses. CEO Zach George stated the company is well positioned to further expand our retail network and pursuing U.S. opportunities following Nasdaq's approval of the SunStream USA structure.
